title: Vintage Americana Block Party Invitation — Editable Retro Summer Cookout Template
description:
A neighborhood throwback in ink and bunting. Warm cream stock, washed reds and navies, and confident letterpress type set the tone before anyone reads a word — this is the invite that gets pinned to the fridge.

Delivered as a print-ready high-resolution file. Hand it to the lab or run it on the home printer; the layout is built to stay crisp at postcard and half-sheet sizes.

Instant digital download. No physical item ships.
